name: Cursor
philosophy: An AI-first code editor whose marketing site reads like a quietly-confident developer-tools brand with a warm-cream editorial canvas (#f7f7f4) instead of the typical dark IDE atmosphere.
trademark_signals: Warm cream canvas, not white. Ink is warm (#26251e), not pure black
Single CTA color: (Cursor Orange #f54e00). Used scarcely
Display weight stays at 400 — never bold. Magazine voice
AI timeline pastels: 5 dedicated tokens for in-product agent action stages
ai_slop_avoided: Don't introduce a secondary brand action color. Cursor Orange is the only one
Don't drop display to bold weights (700+). Magazine voice depends on 400
Don't add drop shadows. Hairlines + ink-on-cream contrast carry the depth
